feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM Custom logic not working for changing delivery quantity (SAP Cloud ERP)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We need to use LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM  logic to change item quantity at delivery bu when we implemented the logic it change the data at backend and cds views but at the screen G_LFIMG value stands constant. 

We implemented custom logic as below: 

 

After we created the delivery quantity still seen as 3 at main screen 

Bu at picking tab of item LE_SHP_MODIFY_ITEM worked and changed quantity to 1 

Even in the cds views values are changed to 1 but still G_LFIMG field seems as 3 

 

BR,
Evrim

fyi @hasanbayram @yusufavci @dogaozdogan 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: Released CDS View for Sales Price Condition Records with Material ID, in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

System : SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

We are building an external OData API in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.
Our goal is to merge Sales Pricing data with Inventory (Material Stock)
data into a single API for downstream consumption.

GOAL:
Expose a combined Stock + Sales Price API by joining:
- I_MaterialStock_2 (inventory/stock levels per plant & storage location)
- A Sales Price CDS view (with Material ID as the join key)

PROBLEM:
The only relevant released CDS view we found is I_SlsPrcgConditionRecord
— but it does NOT include the Material / Product field.
Without Material ID, we cannot join pricing data with stock data
at the material level.

ALREADY CHECKED:
- I_SlsPrcgConditionRecord — no Material ID field
- I_SlsPrcgConditionRecordValidity — Material ID not consistently exposed
- SAP API Business Hub (api.sap.com) — no suitable released OData service found
- SAP Help Portal and SAP Notes — no workaround found

DESIRED API DATA MODEL (illustrative):

SELECT
s.Material,
s.Plant,
s.StorageLocation,
s.MatlWrhsStkQtyInMatlBaseUnit AS StockQuantity,
p.ConditionRateValue AS SalesPrice,
p.TransactionCurrency,
p.ConditionValidityEndDate
FROM I_MaterialStock_2 AS s
JOIN <Missing Sales Price CDS> AS p ON s.Material = p.Material

REQUIRED FIELDS from the missing Sales Price CDS view:
- Material / Product (mandatory join key)
- ConditionType (e.g. PR00)
- ConditionRateValue (price amount)
- TransactionCurrency
- SalesOrganization / DistributionChannel (for filtering)
- ConditionValidityStartDate / ConditionValidityEndDate

QUESTIONS:
1. Does a released CDS view exist that exposes Sales Price
Condition Records WITH Material ID?
2. If not, is SAP planning to release one  and when?
3. What is the SAP-recommended approach to join I_MaterialStock_2
with Sales Price data for an external-facing OData API?
4. If a custom approach is needed, is RAP/BTP extensibility
the right pattern within S/4HANA Cloud boundaries?

We have exhausted all self-service options before posting here.
Any guidance from the community or SAP experts is greatly appreciated!

Thank you.

Rudhra

entry.title: Updating Production Order Component Quantity as per Batch from Custom App to SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are working with Custom Application (using RAP Application) in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, where Batch wise line items are created with fields such as Batch, Quantity, Unit of measurement , Plant, Material, Storage Location, Backflush Indicator, Material Category, & Sequence Category.

Our requirement is to update these line items in the Component tab of the Production Order in the standard SAP Public Cloud system.

In other words, each Batch wise line item created in the Custom Application should get populated in a corresponding component tab in the Production Order.

We explored the CDS view I_ProductionOrderOpComponentTP, but as it is not a root view, we are unable to perform transactional updates using EML (Entity Manipulation Language) for transactional updates.

Below is the field mapping for reference

 

CDS View FieldCustom App Field
RequiredQuantityQuantity
BaseUnitUOM
BatchBatch
PlantPlant
MaterialProduct
BillOfMaterialItemNumberLine Item Number
StorageLocationMRM1'
MatlCompIsMarkedForBackflush'X'
BillOfMaterialItemCategoryL'
SequenceCategory                          '0'


We would like to know if there is any available BAdI, API, or transactional CDS view that can be used to achieve this requirement.

Best Regards,

Thank you.

entry.title: How to Enable Translations for RAP-based Fiori Apps in S/4HANA Public Cloud?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have created a Fiori application using the RAP Generator and deployed it in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Now, I’m trying to maintain translations (for example, Italian) so that the app UI, labels, and catalog texts adapt based on the user’s logon language.

Could anyone guide me on the recommended way to handle translations for RAP-based Fiori apps in S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Any insights, best practices, or documentation references would be really helpful.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Jagadhatri

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition  SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Extensibility

entry.title: EML Create Business Partner Problem - The issue has been resolved
entry.content:
I'm trying to create a Business Partner using EML (Entity Manipulation Language) with the standard interface view i_businesspartnertp_3 In SAP S4Hana Public Cloud.

The implementation executes without any runtime errors, and both FAILED and FAILED_COMMIT structures are initial. However, the Business Partner is not created in the system.

CLASS zcl_businessobject DEFINITION
PUBLIC
FINAL
CREATE PUBLIC .

PUBLIC SECTION.

INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun .
PROTECTED SECTION.
PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.




CLASS zcl_businessobject IMPLEMENTATION.


METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.


DATA create_partner TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE i_businesspartnertp_3.
create_partner = VALUE #( (
%cid = 'bp1'
businesspartnercategory = '1'
%control-businesspartnercategory = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
lastname = 'Test_BP5'
%control-lastname = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
) ).
MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_businesspartnertp_3
ENTITY businesspartner
CREATE FROM create_partner
CREATE BY \_businesspartneraddress
FIELDS ( country cityname ) WITH VALUE #( (
%cid_ref = 'bp1'
%target = VALUE #(
(
%cid = 'bp1_1'
country = 'IN'
cityname = 'Bangalore'
)
)
) )
MAPPED DATA(mapped)
REPORTED DATA(reported)
FAILED DATA(failed).
COMMIT ENTITIES
RESPONSE OF i_businesspartnertp_3
FAILED DATA(failed_commit)
REPORTED DATA(reported_commit).
IF failed_commit IS NOT INITIAL.
out->write( |Error| ).
ELSE.
out->write( |Sucess.| ).
ENDIF.


ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.


Any guidance on why the entity is not created despite no reported errors would be appreciated.

Best regards

entry.title: Business Partner Not Created via EML – The issue has been resolved
entry.content:
We are trying to create a Business Partner using EML (Entity Manipulation Language) with the standard interface view i_businesspartnertp_3.

The implementation executes without any runtime errors, and both FAILED and FAILED_COMMIT structures are initial. However, the Business Partner is not created in the system.

 

CLASS zcl_businessobject DEFINITION
PUBLIC
FINAL
CREATE PUBLIC .

PUBLIC SECTION.

INTERFACES if_oo_adt_classrun .
PROTECTED SECTION.
PRIVATE SECTION.
ENDCLASS.




CLASS zcl_businessobject IMPLEMENTATION.


METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.


DATA create_partner TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE i_businesspartnertp_3.
create_partner = VALUE #( (
%cid = 'bp1'
businesspartnercategory = '1'
%control-businesspartnercategory = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
lastname = 'Test_BP5'
%control-lastname = if_abap_behv=>mk-on
) ).
MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_businesspartnertp_3
ENTITY businesspartner
CREATE FROM create_partner
CREATE BY \_businesspartneraddress
FIELDS ( country cityname ) WITH VALUE #( (
%cid_ref = 'bp1'
%target = VALUE #(
(
%cid = 'bp1_1'
country = 'IN'
cityname = 'Bangalore'
)
)
) )
MAPPED DATA(mapped)
REPORTED DATA(reported)
FAILED DATA(failed).
COMMIT ENTITIES
RESPONSE OF i_businesspartnertp_3
FAILED DATA(failed_commit)
REPORTED DATA(reported_commit).
IF failed_commit IS NOT INITIAL.
out->write( |Error| ).
ELSE.
out->write( |Socio de negocio creado correctamente.| ).
ENDIF.


ENDMETHOD.
ENDCLASS.

entry.title: How do l implement a user exit or badi to retrigger release strategy when price or quantity decrease
entry.content: I have been tasked to implement a user exit to retrigger PO release strategy when there is a net price, quantity or net value increase or decrease.  How do l implement a user exit or badi to retrigger release strategy since sap only retriggers when there is an increase only. I have implemented user exit EXIT_SAPLEBND_002 but it turns out some orders are retriggering and some orders are not so l need some help

entry.title: CLEAR ITAB or REFRESH ITAB
entry.content:
Hello All,

What is the difference between CLEAR ITAB & REFRESH ITAB? Which is better in Modern ABAP and why?

entry.title: I cant able to logon in to my sap abap cloud (ADT) - eclipse
entry.content:
I cant able to logon in to my sap abap cloud (ADT) - eclipse, even i have enrolled my pratice system is enrolled and active in sap learning hub.

Help me out!!

entry.title: Updated Key field length of database and when TR is released, error is occurring in RAP Eclipse
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm new in s4hana cloud public RAP.

I created RAP custom app in Eclipse and deployed to 080 dev tenant.

And later, I updated the key field length and added new field. Since it was able to update successfully, I though there is no problem.

But, now I need to transport/deploy that custom app to Test Tenant.

So, I release the Transport request/task in Eclipse and the following error is occurring.

Changes in ZC_ITEM(CDS_STOB) for Use in Key User Apps, compared to snapshot 100(0000), found by component BC-DWB-DIC: Key element KEY_NO was added.

Changes in ZC_ITEM(CDS_STOB) for Use in Cloud Development, compared to snapshot 100(0000), found by component BC-DWB-DIC: Key element KEY_NO was added. 

API Release: Compatibility of Released Objects

How can I fix that kind of issue quickly and what is the best practice solution?

 

Best Regards,

Aye Chan

entry.title: CDS to get Approver Name of Purchase Contract
entry.content:
We have activated flexible workflow for Purchase Contract in S4 Hana Public Cloud , Wanted to fetch the approver name of purchase contract. Couldn't able to get the desired CDS. Can you help please ?

Cloud

entry.title: Is class_constructor a good method to place the buffer in?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

As the subject suggests. I'm trying to understand what the best method is for placing the buffer.

I know that Class_constructor can't be used with a WHERE clause; therefore, the buffer must read the whole table. I'm not sure if this is suitable for some cases or not, based on the size of the table. I would love a clear explanation of this topic.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY BAdI
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Is there anyone who successfully used this BAdI [RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY]?
https://api.sap.com/badi/RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY 
API documentation show it is released for Developer Extensibility.
But when we try to use, we found this information.
"The standard implementation RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY_S001 is already active. Therefore, from a framework perspective, it is not possible to create an additional custom implementation to replace or overwrite the existing standard logic.".
Also, we cannot change the logic in standard class too.
Class : CL_RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY_EX
Error : You have no authorization in S_DEVELOP to switch off the Assistant for CL_RFM_ALLOCATION_STRATEGY_EX

We have S_DEVELOP authorization and still encountering same error.
Any advice please?

Regards,
May

entry.title: Custom Batch Number Creation for Process Order in SAP Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello,

Strictly in Public Cloud - I have a requirement where custom batch number needs to be assigned in Process Order creation screen for Co - Product, By product and for Order Material.

Is it possible to assign the Batch code by suppressing the internal N/R with the criteria maintained in Z table. For example,  i maintain for material POLYMER as "PL" in z table. And my batch code is assigned as PL0426 (04 is current month & 26 is current year).

I need clarification whether this modification can be done using BADI at COR1 - Create process order, COR2 - Change Process Order, COR6N - Confirmation Order, MIGO - Post Goods movement.

If anyone had done this enhancement, please drop a reply.

Thanks & Regards,

Pranay Teja K.

entry.title: ABAP XFT - Upload PDF to File Node
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am currently working on an ABAP requirement where I need to programmatically attach a generated PDF document to an XFT node of type File.

Current implementation status:

  1. I generate the form output from SmartForms and receive the OTF data.
  2. I convert the OTF output into PDF format (XSTRING).
  3. I already have the header / identification data of the target XFT node.

My issue is with the final step: I am unable to find the correct standard function module, class, or API to attach the PDF binary content (XSTRING) to the XFT file node.

I have already explored standard document-related classes and function modules, but so far I haven't identified the correct XFT API.

Questions:

  • Is there a standard class or function module for uploading content into an XFT file node?
  • Is there any recommended approach or framework for this scenario?
  • Has anyone implemented something similar in ECC or S/4HANA?

Any guidance, examples, or pointers would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Hi team, I want transfer the Additional fields from the Product master from S4 HANA to GTS.
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

In the standard SAP GTS build, S/4 materials are replicated in the SAP GTS system via RFC and information from the basic data view is migrated automatically in the system. For material level attributes not transferred natively, a GTS Badi is available in the S/4 GTS Plug-In.  Combined with SAP GTS IMG configuration the system can store these additional values in predefined table fields specified in configuration. Additional fields, in the material master, need to be passed to GTS, from S/4 System

  • Customs description (Sales text)
  • Material Type
  • Material Group
  • Division
  • Country of Origin

Can someone please tell me How I can proceed with the Development ?
very High in complexity. kindly please response as soon as possible. 7499552629.

entry.title: Fiori Generator error: "Edmx metadata is required" using Reentrance Ticket
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

I am encountering an issue while trying to generate a SAP Fiori application (List Report Page) using the @SAP/fiori:app generator in VS Code.

Environment Details:

  • Target System: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

  • System Type Selected: ABAP Environment on SAP Business Technology Platform

  • Authentication Method: Use Reentrance Ticket

Steps to Reproduce:

  1. Open SAP Fiori generator in VS Code.

  2. Select "List Report Page" template.

  3. In Data Source step, choose "Connect to a System" -> "New System".

  4. Set System Type to "ABAP Environment on SAP Business Technology Platform" and Definition Source to "Use Reentrance Ticket".

  5. Enter the System URL and click Next.

Observed Behavior: As soon as I click the Next button, the Application Wizard immediately crashes and throws the following error message (as shown in the attached screenshot):

@sap/fiori:app generator failed - env.on(error) An error has occurred, please restart the generator. : Error: An error has occurred, please restart the generator. : Edmx metadata is required to continue with generation. Application generation exiting.

What I have checked:

  1. The browser popup didn't seem to block any authentication process, but the tool didn't route me further to fetch the service list.

  2. It seems the generator failed to fetch the Edmx metadata from the backend system via the Reentrance Ticket flow.

Could you please guide me on how to resolve this? Is there a specific communication scenario, catalog service permission, or Business Role missing for my business user in the S/4HANA Cloud system to allow metadata fetching via Reentrance Ticket?

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: Purchase Document A_PurchaseContractItemConditionValidity PATCH Method not updating End Date.
entry.content:
I am trying to update the validity End Date (ConditionValidityEndDate) for an existing purchase contract item condition using a PATCH call.  However, the End Date is not getting updated in the backend

SAP S/4HANA API: not working
API: A_PurchaseContractItemConditionValidity
Unable to identify the Operation: PATCH?

Working with Header Level is updating the ValidityEndDate but not succeed in the Condition Validity level, Kindly help me to whether anyone have successfully updated dates using this API with Full or Partial Payload? Please throw some lights on same.

entry.title: Issue in activating ZDMO_RAP_GENERATOR in ABAP Cloud
entry.content:
In Cloud ABAP RAP I have pulled the abapgit files from cloud-abap-rap/README.md at main · SAP-samples/cloud-abap-rap · GitHub.

However, when I try to activate the ZDMO_RAP_GENERATOR I have errors in activation.

Can someone provide a solution to activate the ZDMO_RAP_GENERATOR.

entry.title: Forms Label Translation
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I would like to seek your assistance in if there is an translation application, tool, or CDS view in S/4HANA Cloud Public that can be used to translate form labels. For example, if I want to translate a form label from English to Dutch, I would like to provide the English label as input and receive the corresponding Dutch translation as the output.
 
Thank you!
SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 
SAP Forms service by Adobe
